name: Vyome Holdings, Inc
business: Vyome Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage specialty pharmaceutical company working to treat immune-inflammatory and rare diseases of unmet need with next-generation therapeutic solutions, with a business advantage of the US-India innovation corridor. The company also has a pharmaceutical segment comprising antifungal products commercialized in India under a licensing and marketing agreement with Sun Pharma Laboratories Limited.

exposures.sentence: We are a Cambridge, MA/Princeton, NJ/New Delhi, India-based clinical-stage specialty pharmaceutical company working to treat immune-inflammatory and rare diseases of unmet need with next-generation therapeutic solutions, with a business advantage of the US-India innovation corridor.

catalysts.event: FDA discussions on pivotal trial study design for VT-1953
catalysts.sentence: The Company is planning to have discussions with the Food & Drug Administration (FDA) on a pivotal trial study design in the second quarter of 2026.
